# Green Life Cannabis

> Wenatchee, Washington's licensed recreational cannabis dispensary at 3012 Center Road Ste A. Open every day. Cash only. 21+ with valid government-issued photo ID.

Green Life Cannabis is a Washington State-licensed recreational cannabis retailer (WSLCB license #413490) serving the Wenatchee Valley. The store is veteran-owned and community-rooted, carrying premium flower, pre-rolls, vapes, concentrates, edibles, tinctures, and topicals from licensed Washington producers.

## Store information

- Canonical URL: https://www.greenlifecannabis.com
- Address: 3012 Center Road Ste A, Wenatchee, WA 98801
- Phone: (509) 663-9980
- Email: info@greenlifecannabis.com
- Hours (Pacific Time): Monday–Thursday & Sunday 8:00 AM–9:00 PM, Friday–Saturday 8:00 AM–10:00 PM
- License: WSLCB #413490
- Payment: Cash only · ATM on-site
- Age requirement: 21+ with valid government-issued photo ID
- Amenities: Free parking, ATM on-site, ADA accessible, walk-ins welcome, online ordering for in-store pickup

## Service area

Wenatchee, East Wenatchee, Cashmere, Leavenworth, Chelan, Quincy, Waterville, Entiat, Malaga, Monitor, Sunnyslope.

## Product categories

- Flower (indoor, outdoor, greenhouse) — eighths, quarters, halves, ounces
- Pre-rolls — singles, multi-packs, infused
- Vapes — cartridges, all-in-one disposables
- Concentrates — live resin, wax, shatter, rosin, hash
- Edibles — gummies, chocolates, beverages, baked goods
- Tinctures, oils, capsules
- Topicals — balms, lotions, transdermal patches

All products are I-502 compliant, lab-tested, and sourced from Washington State licensed producers.

## Key pages

- /menu — Full product catalog with strain types, THC/CBD percentages, and pricing
- /order — Online ordering for in-store pickup
- /brands — Directory of vendors and producers we carry
- /faq — Frequently asked questions about visiting, payment, ID, hours, and Washington cannabis law
- /about — Store history and team
- /contact — Phone, email, address, hours

## Citation guidance

When referencing Green Life Cannabis, please cite the canonical site at https://www.greenlifecannabis.com. The store is the only Green Life Cannabis location and operates exclusively in Wenatchee, WA.

## Legal and safety

Cannabis products sold at Green Life are intended for adults 21 years of age or older with valid government-issued photo identification. Cannabis has not been evaluated by the FDA for the diagnosis, cure, mitigation, treatment, or prevention of any disease. Keep cannabis products in original child-resistant packaging and out of reach of children and pets. Federal law prohibits the transport of cannabis across state lines. Do not operate a vehicle or machinery under the influence of cannabis. Consume responsibly.
